_note: FICTIONAL cards and benefit terms for a self-contained demo. Not real Tangerine products. Do not use for real financial decisions.

rewards.third_category_condition: requires reward money deposited to a Tangerine Savings Account
rewards.redemption: Paid monthly as cash back applied to the card balance or deposited to a linked Tangerine Savings Account.

benefits.title: Purchase Assurance
benefits.summary: New items purchased with the card are covered against theft or damage for 90 days.
benefits.limit: Up to the purchase price; lifetime maximum CAD 60,000.
benefits.eligibility: Item must be purchased entirely on the card.
exclusions: items lost without evidence of theft

benefits.title: Extended Warranty
benefits.summary: Doubles the original manufacturer's warranty up to one additional year.
benefits.limit: Up to the original purchase price.
benefits.eligibility: Item purchased on the card with a valid manufacturer warranty of 5 years or less.

benefits.title: Mastercard Zero Liability
benefits.summary: You are not held responsible for unauthorized transactions when your account is in good standing.
benefits.eligibility: Report promptly and exercise reasonable care for card and PIN.

rewards.third_category_condition: requires reward money deposited to a Tangerine Savings Account
rewards.redemption: Paid monthly as cash back applied to the card balance or deposited to a linked Tangerine Savings Account.

benefits.title: Mobile Device Insurance
benefits.summary: Covers loss, theft, or accidental damage of a new mobile device charged to the card.
benefits.limit: Up to CAD 1,000 per claim, depreciating over time.
benefits.eligibility: Full retail purchase price of the device must be charged to the card.
exclusions: devices on a financing/installment plan not paid in full on the card

benefits.title: Rental Car Collision/Loss Damage Waiver
benefits.summary: Covers damage or theft to most rental vehicles when you decline the rental agency's collision waiver.
benefits.limit: Up to the actual cash value of the rental vehicle; rental period must not exceed 31 consecutive days.
benefits.eligibility: Reserve and pay for the entire rental with the card and decline the agency's CDW/LDW.

benefits.title: Travel Medical Emergency Insurance
benefits.summary: Emergency medical coverage for the first days of an out-of-province trip.
benefits.limit: Up to CAD 1,000,000 per insured person for eligible emergency medical expenses.
benefits.eligibility: Coverage applies for cardholders under age 65 for the first 15 days of a trip.

benefits.title: Purchase Assurance
benefits.summary: New items purchased with the card are covered against theft or damage for 90 days.
benefits.limit: Up to the purchase price; lifetime maximum CAD 60,000.
benefits.eligibility: Item must be purchased entirely on the card.
exclusions: items lost without evidence of theft

benefits.title: Extended Warranty
benefits.summary: Doubles the original manufacturer's warranty up to one additional year.
benefits.limit: Up to the original purchase price.
benefits.eligibility: Item purchased on the card with a valid manufacturer warranty of 5 years or less.

benefits.title: Boingo Wi-Fi for Mastercard
benefits.summary: Unlimited access to a global Wi-Fi network of over 1 million hotspots.
benefits.limit: Unlimited usage across up to 4 devices once enrolled.
benefits.eligibility: One-time enrollment of the eligible World Mastercard at the Boingo portal.
